flashcards.definition: Know exact values at 0°, 30°, 45°, 60°, 90° and all quadrants.
y = A sin(Bx − C) + D: identify amplitude |A|, period 2π/B, phase C/B, midline D.
Pythagorean, reciprocal, quotient, double-angle, sum/difference, power-reduction.
Isolate trig function → inverse → quadrant analysis → general solution if needed.
AP problems often combine multiple concepts in one question.
